entities.name: CROP GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of the genomes of crops to improve agriculture

entities.name: GENETICS
entities.description: The study of genes, genetic variation, and heredity in organisms

entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The science or practice of farming, including cultivation of the soil for the growing of crops

entities.name: ORPHAN TROPICAL CROPS
entities.description: Tropical crops that are underutilized or neglected in research and breeding

entities.name: GENOMIC RESOURCE-RICH ENTITIES
entities.description: Crops or organisms that have extensive genomic data and resources available for research

entities.name: TRANSLATIONAL GENOMICS
entities.description: The application of genomic research to develop practical tools and varieties for crop improvement

entities.name: SEED SYSTEM
entities.description: The network of processes and institutions involved in the production, distribution, and use of seeds

entities.name: DEVELOPING COUNTRIES
entities.description: Nations with lower industrialization and lower human development indices

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of altering the genetic makeup of a plant to improve its yield or quality

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where Professor Varshney started his academic journey
